calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Wendy Pun, CSR #12891.

C. Andrew Gibson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff S.J. Amoroso Construction Co., Inc., a California corporation.
No appearance by defendant EA Environnmental Construction, Inc., also known as Environmental Acoustics, a business entity, form unknown, purporting to be a California corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on September 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, November 19, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff S.J. Amoroso Construction Co., Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant EA Environnmental Construction, Inc., also known as Environmental Acoustics, a business entity, form unknown, purporting to be a California corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,690,385.00.
Prejudgment Interest $430,686.00.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - Reserved.
(Less Payments Received) - ($579,148.84).

Total - $3,541,922.16

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Margaret Choe, Esq. for Cross-Complainant Lincoln General Insurance Company, a Pennsylvania corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness John Northrop appeared by telephone was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Cross-Defendants: EA Environmental Construction, Inc., aka Environmental Acoustics; Tsafrir Aviezer aka Jeff Aviezer and Maritza Aviezer.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
Damages $928,437.88
Interest $253,8222.91
Total $1,182260.79
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses From Lincoln General Insurance Company To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Andrew Gibson, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: S.J. Amoroso Construction
Mark A. Oertel, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Lincoln General Insurance Company

Hearing held. Plaintiff S. J. Amoroso Construction Company, Inc.'s motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents [Set No. One] from Lincoln General Insurance Company
Ruling as follows:
Tentative adopted:
- As to Request for Production nos. 35, 37, and 38, denied;
- As to Request for Production no. 36, granted as to any documents not privileged; if documents exist which are responsive to request for production no. 36, but are claimed as privileged, defendant shall provide a privilege log;
- As to Request for Production nos. 10, 12, 13, and 14, the parties agree that defendant shall provide documents, subject to claim of privilege and production of a privilege log.
- As to Request for Production nos. 39, denied without prejudice.
- Request for production no. 42 is moot, in that no such documents exitst.
- Request for sanction is Denied.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
